file: MOTRTurb-M,S,Cs_Korea-Motors, Turbine, Multiple, Blade Whoosh, Gusty, Snappy, People Walking, Yeongdeok, 02_FTUS_WOSB.ogg
desc: A wide recording of multiple wind turbines spinning at Yeongdeok Wind Farm in South Korea. The layered whooshes of the blades cutting through the wind create an intense and dynamic soundscape, at times gusty and almost snapping as the air pressure shifts. The atmosphere is punctuated by the faint presence of people walking around the area, grounding the otherwise overwhelming rush of mechanical energy. This immersive ambience captures the scale and power of a wind farm in full operation.
